ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frame_types" (
  "frame_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame type */,
  "frame_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the frame type (e.g., Unicast, Multicast) */,
  "frame_type_code" TEXT /* Short code for the frame type (e.g., UC, MC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the frame type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocol_specifics" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol (e.g., Protocol-Specific Information) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the protocol */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_address_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter operation */,
  "filter_operation" TEXT /* Description of the filter operation (e.g., Passallframes, Passwhennotdiscarded) */,
  "filter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the filter operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filtering_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filtering rule */,
  "frame_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frame type */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protocol-specific information */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source address filter operation */,
  "discard_non_matching" INTEGER /* Indicates whether non-matching frames should be discarded */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the filtering rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the filtering rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filtering_rules_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocol_specifics ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filtering_rules_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES source_address_filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filtering_rules_frame_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_type_id") REFERENCES frame_types ("frame_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the client */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_rules" (
  "client_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client rule association */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the filtering rule */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rule is enabled for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_rules_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES filtering_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_rules_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the filtering rule */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event (e.g., Rule applied, Frame discarded) */,
  "frame_data" TEXT /* Data of the frame that triggered the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_logs_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES filtering_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network admin, security analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "session_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., login, logout, rule modification) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who triggered the event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client associated with the event */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the filtering rule associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES filtering_rules ("rule_id")
)
